discovery: AGET migration creates components but doesn't auto-activate
problems_identified: Identity file created (AGENTS_ENHANCED.md) but not activated
Evolution directories empty - no seed data
First session used generic response instead of agent personality

impact.user_experience: Confusing - migration 'complete' but agent not active
impact.value_delivery: Delayed - capabilities present but not utilized

root_cause: Migration focused on creating structure, not activation
pattern_learned: Migration must be end-to-end: structure → activation → verification → first-use
template_improvements: Include seed data in evolution directories
success_criteria: User should wake up agent and immediately see personality, not generic response
